name: vac
description: VAC - Virtual Avatar Companion desktop AI companion monorepo.

scripts.package:desktop: pnpm --filter @vac/ai-core build && pnpm --filter @vac/memory build && pnpm --filter @vac/voice-engine build && pnpm --filter @vac/renderer build && pnpm --filter @vac/desktop build && pnpm --filter @vac/desktop package
scripts.test: pnpm verify:phase0 && pnpm verify:phase1 && pnpm verify:phase2 && pnpm verify:phase3 && pnpm verify:phase4 && pnpm verify:phase5 && pnpm verify:phase6 && pnpm verify:phase7 && pnpm verify:phase8 && pnpm verify:phase9 && pnpm verify:phase10 && pnpm verify:mvp1 && pnpm verify:mvp2 && pnpm verify:mvp3 && pnpm verify:mvp4 && pnpm verify:mvp5 && pnpm verify:mvp6 && pnpm verify:mvp7 && pnpm verify:mvp8 && pnpm verify:mvp9 && pnpm verify:mvp10 && pnpm verify:mvp11 && pnpm verify:mvp12 && pnpm verify:mvp13 && pnpm verify:mvp14 && pnpm verify:mvp15 && pnpm --filter @vac/renderer build && pnpm --filter @vac/avatar-engine build && pnpm --filter @vac/voice-engine build && pnpm --filter @vac/ai-core build && pnpm --filter @vac/memory build && pnpm --filter @vac/offline build && pnpm --filter @vac/self-dev build && pnpm --filter @vac/backend build && pnpm --filter @vac/desktop build
